NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR NOV-12-2024 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JAN-10-2024 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR NOV-12-2024 - CASE SETTLED. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 610 ON APR-08-2025 AT 10:30 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385. MICHAEL TCHENG, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS COUNSEL'S FIRM, QUILL & ARROW, LLP, AT TRIAL CALL. (THE COURT RECALLED THIS MATTER AFTER THE CONCLUSION OF THE CALENDAR. THE COURT NOTED THAT THE QUILL & ARROW, LLP LAW FIRM HAS A HABIT OF NOT SENDING ANYONE HERE. THE FIRM DID CALL THE COURT THIS MORNING THAT THE CASE SETTLED. THE COURT HAD PREVIOUSLY ISSUED SANCTIONS BEFORE AND AN OSC FOR COUNSEL TO APPEAR SEVERAL WEEKS AGO IN ANOTHER CASE & COUNSEL DID APPEAR BECAUSE OF THE HABITUAL NATURE OF THE FIRM NOT CONTACTING THE COURT, WHICH GENERATES MORE WORK FOR THE LEGAL STAFF TO REACH OUT TO THEM. THEY HAVE BEEN UNRESPONSIVE TO EMAILS & VOICEMAILS. IF THIS HAPPENS AGAIN, THE COURT WILL INTEND TO ISSUE SANCTIONS OF $1,500.00 AND IT WILL BE REPORTED TO THE STATE BAR.) JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-08-2025 CONTINUED TO JUL-08-2025 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
